name: Summoner of the Sacred Beasts
effectText: You can reveal this card in your hand; discard 1 card, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Sacred Beast" monster from your hand in Defense Position, except a Level 8 monster. You can discard 1 card; Special Summon 1 "Sacred Beast" monster from your hand or GY in Defense Position, except a Level 8 monster or the discarded card. You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 "Sacred Beast" monster from your GY in Defense Position, except a Level 8 monster. You can only use each effect of "Summoner of the Sacred Beasts" once per turn.
